description: This file contains unit tests for the Toast component, testing its behavior, configuration, and integration with jQuery. It imports the Toast class and helper functions, and uses Jasmine for test definitions.

classes.name: Toast
classes.description: The Toast class provides functionality for toast notifications, including show, hide, dispose, and configuration management.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Toast instance associated with a DOM element, or null if none exists.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Toast instance or creates a new one with optional configuration.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: jQuery plugin interface for creating or interacting with Toast instances.
